---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Motivation
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**What is the use case for this feature?**
Describe how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it.

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🧩 Component Area
Which component would this feature affect? (Check all that apply)
- [ ] API/Backend Services
- [ ] Agent Catalogue System
- [ ] AI Agent Development
- [ ] UI/Frontend
- [ ] Worker/Queue System
- [ ] Database/Models
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization
- [ ] Logging/Monitoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Developer Tools
- [ ] Testing Framework
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 📋 Feature Scope
**Complexity Level** (Check one)
- [ ] Small - Minor enhancement or improvement
- [ ] Medium - New feature with moderate complexity
- [ ] Large - Major feature requiring significant development

**Priority** (Check one)
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would improve user experience
- [ ] High - Important for project goals
- [ ] Critical - Blocking or urgent need

## 🔧 Technical Requirements
**Technical considerations or requirements:**
- [ ] Requires database schema changes
- [ ] Requires API changes
- [ ] Requires UI/UX design
- [ ] Requires new dependencies
- [ ] Requires worker/queue modifications
- [ ] Requires documentation updates
- [ ] Requires testing updates
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 📖 User Story
**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [some goal]
**So that** [some reason/benefit]

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples to help illustrate the feature.

## 📚 Additional Resources
Add any references, links, or documentation that support this feature request.

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the motivation and use case
- [ ] I have considered the technical impact
- [ ] I have reviewed the [project roadmap](docs/README.md) and [architecture](docs/architecture.md)
